name: Asterius

distinctive_features: Star-like or celestial motifs on skin or armor
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: Towering over humans, approximately 20 feet tall

domain_specific_visual.CELESTIAL_MOTIFS: Star patterns on armor or skin
domain_specific_visual.WEAPONRY: Carries a massive club or spear

domain_specific_functional.ROLE_IN_MYTH: Participated in battles against gods or heroes
domain_specific_functional.SYMBOLISM: Represents the power of nature or the cosmos

relationships.description: Slain by Heracles in revenge for his father Neleus

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents the formidable power of giants in Greek myths

contrastive_constraints: NOT a peaceful or benign figure
